reasoning: While the fidelity scores are exceptionally high (0.9959) and programmatic signals are strong, the conversion failed to capture functional text embedded within map graphics, specifically critical dates ('February 2025') and geographical markers. Because these omissions involve informative data rather than mere cosmetic formatting, human judgment is required to ensure the document meets government accessibility standards for map-based information.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: The conversion failed to capture specific text data located within the map graphics on pages 1 and 2. On page 1, the map contains two callouts: 'QL 1 data collection completed' and 'Data available February 2025'. On page 2, there is a sub-heading within the map area: 'High Resolution Topographic Refresh Western North Carolina'. action_items: Verify that the map callouts and dates are manually added to the alt-text or structured description to ensure the data is accessible to screen readers.
